# Biblioteca / Library Section — Design Spec

**Date:** 2026-05-16
**Status:** Approved

---

## Overview

Add a `/biblioteca` (ES) / `/library` (EN) section to sergiomonsalve.com that displays Sergio's Audible audiobook collection. Books are populated via `audible-cli` exports merged with optional hand-written MDX notes per book.

---

## Data Architecture

### Two sources of truth

**`data/library.json`** — Generated by `audible-cli`, committed to the repo. Contains Audible metadata for all books in the library. Schema:

```ts
type AudibleBook = {
  asin: string           // unique ID, used as slug
  title: string
  authors: string[]
  narrators: string[]
  cover_url: string
  runtime_length_min: number
  purchase_date: string  // ISO date
  percent_complete: number
  publisher_summary: string
}
```

**`content/library/[locale]/[asin].mdx`** — Optional, one per book per locale. Frontmatter:

```yaml
---
status: listening | completed | queued | abandoned
rating: 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5
highlights:
  - "Quote one"
  - "Quote two"
---

Personal review in Markdown (free text).
```

Body is the personal review in Markdown. File is optional — if absent, the detail page shows only Audible metadata.

### Merge logic (`src/lib/library.ts`)

- Reads `data/library.json` as the source of all books
- For each book, checks if `content/library/[locale]/[asin].mdx` exists
- If it does, merges frontmatter fields (`status`, `rating`, `highlights`) and parses MDX body as `content`
- Books without an MDX file default to `status: "queued"`, `rating: null`, `highlights: []`, `content: null`
- `getAllBooks(locale)` returns `BookMeta[]` sorted by `purchase_date` desc
- `getBook(asin, locale)` returns `Book | null` (with `content`)

```ts
type BookMeta = {
  asin: string
  title: string
  authors: string[]
  narrators: string[]
  cover_url: string
  runtime_length_min: number
  purchase_date: string
  percent_complete: number
  publisher_summary: string
  status: 'listening' | 'completed' | 'queued' | 'abandoned'
  rating: number | null
}

type Book = BookMeta & {
  highlights: string[]
  content: string | null
}
```

---

## Import Script

**`scripts/import-audible.ts`** — Normalizes raw `audible-cli` JSON output to the `data/library.json` format expected by the app. Run manually when updating the library.

```bash
# Export from Audible CLI
audible library export --output /tmp/raw-library.json
# Normalize and write to project
npx tsx scripts/import-audible.ts /tmp/raw-library.json
# Commit
git add data/library.json && git commit -m "chore: update audible library"
```

The script maps `audible-cli` field names (which vary by export format) to the normalized schema above, dropping fields not needed by the UI.

---

## Routes

| Path | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `/[locale]/biblioteca` | Book list with status filters |
| `/[locale]/biblioteca/[asin]` | Book detail page |

Route is `/biblioteca` in both locales — a single path, no locale-specific URL variants. The page title changes via i18n but the URL stays the same.

---

## Pages

### List page — `/[locale]/biblioteca/page.tsx`

- Server component
- Header: `// biblioteca` (mono accent) + `Biblioteca` h1
- Status filter bar: todos | leyendo | completados | en lista | abandonados
  - Same tag-filter pattern as `RecipeList`
  - Filter is client-side state (`BookList` client component)
- Grid of `BookCard` components
- Empty state: `// no hay libros aún`

### Detail page — `/[locale]/biblioteca/[asin]/page.tsx`

- Server component
- Renders cover image (large), title, authors, narrators, duration, purchase date
- `StarRating` component (read-only, 1–5 stars)
- Highlights: each item in a styled `<blockquote>`
- Personal review: MDX body rendered via `MDXContent` (reuses existing component)
- "Escuchar en Audible" link: `https://www.audible.com/pd/[asin]`
- If book not found: `notFound()`

---

## Components

| Component | Type | Description |
|-----------|------|-------------|
| `BookList` | Client | Status filter bar + grid of BookCard |
| `BookCard` | Server | Cover thumbnail, title, author, status badge, star rating, duration |
| `StarRating` | Server | Read-only star display (★★★★☆), accepts `rating: number \| null` |

`BookCard` links to `/biblioteca/[asin]`. No interactive behavior on the card itself.

Status badge colors follow existing token palette:
- `listening` → `text-accent` (green)
- `completed` → `text-text-secondary`
- `queued` → `text-text-muted`
- `abandoned` → `text-text-muted` with strikethrough

---

## i18n

New keys added to both `es.json` and `en.json`:

```json
// es.json
"biblioteca": {
  "comment": "// biblioteca",
  "title": "Biblioteca",
  "allStatuses": "todos",
  "status": {
    "listening": "leyendo",
    "completed": "completado",
    "queued": "en lista",
    "abandoned": "abandonado"
  },
  "highlights": "highlights",
  "listenOnAudible": "Escuchar en Audible →",
  "empty": "no hay libros aún",
  "narrators": "narrado por",
  "duration": "duración"
},
// en.json
"library": {
  "comment": "// library",
  "title": "Library",
  ...
}
```

Nav key added: `"biblioteca": "Biblioteca"` (ES) / `"library": "Library"` (EN).

---

## Navigation

`Nav.tsx` gets a new link between Recipes and Guestbook:

```tsx
<Link href="/biblioteca">{t('biblioteca')}</Link>
```

---

## Sitemap & Metadata

- `sitemap.ts` updated to include `/biblioteca` and all book detail pages
- Each page has `generateMetadata` with title/description from book data
- `alternates.canonical` set per page

---

## Testing

- Unit test for `src/lib/library.ts`: merge logic (book with MDX, book without MDX, missing JSON)
- No component tests needed (follow existing project pattern — only lib functions are unit-tested)

---

## Out of scope

- Comments on book pages
- Audible auto-sync on Vercel build (manual commit workflow only)
- Writing reviews in different languages (MDX per locale exists but is optional)
- Public API for book data
